parameters.query:
WITH prior AS (
  SELECT id, quote_count, blocked, block_reason
  FROM users WHERE email = $1
), recent AS (
  SELECT COUNT(*) AS c
  FROM quotes q JOIN users u ON q.user_id = u.id
  WHERE u.email = $1 AND q.created_at > NOW() - INTERVAL '7 days'
)
SELECT
  COALESCE((SELECT id FROM prior), 0) AS user_id,
  COALESCE((SELECT quote_count FROM prior), 0) AS quote_count,
  COALESCE((SELECT blocked FROM prior), FALSE) AS blocked,
  (SELECT block_reason FROM prior) AS block_reason,
  (SELECT c FROM recent) AS recent_7d;
